quick_skim.title: Learning dynamical systems from noisy data with Weak-form Kernel Ridge Regression
quick_skim.abstract: Accurate prediction of complex dynamical systems from noisy measurements remains a significant challenge in scientific computing. Kernel ridge regression learning strategies are often effective when applied to clean data, but have limited success with noisy data. Recent work has observed that a weak formulation can act to filter noisy data, and different learning strategies have achieved increased noise robustness with a weak-form framework. In this manuscript, we give an overview of the filtering mechanism behind the weak formulation and provide a bias-variance error decomposition. Using these insights, we combine a weak formulation with a kernel learning strategy to propose Weak-form Kernel Ridge Regression (WKRR) for learning dynamical systems. The proposed framework is simple to implement, effective for both clean and noisy data, and outperforms several baseline methods. We demonstrate the performance of WKRR on chaotic benchmark systems in up to 64 dimensions, as well as 15,000-dimensional real-world fluid data.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: data-driven dynamical system learning enables Lyapunov function discovery
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 数据驱动动力学系统学习为李雅普诺夫函数发现提供基础
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 数据驱动动力学系统学习为李雅普诺夫函数发现提供基础
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 数据驱动动力学系统学习为李雅普诺夫函数发现提供基础
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Weak-form Kernel Ridge Regression (WKRR) to learn dynamical systems from noisy data, providing a robust data-driven method that can be used for Lyapunov function discovery.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对从含噪数据学习动力学系统这一难题，本文提出弱形式核岭回归（WKRR）方法。该方法结合弱形式的滤波特性与核学习策略，有效提升对噪声的鲁棒性。理论分析揭示了弱形式的降噪机制和偏差-方差分解。实验证明WKRR在多个噪声水平下均优于传统方法，为后续数据驱动的李雅普诺夫函数发现提供了可靠的基础模型。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对从含噪数据学习动力学系统这一难题，本文提出弱形式核岭回归（WKRR）方法。该方法结合弱形式的滤波特性与核学习策略，有效提升对噪声的鲁棒性。理论分析揭示了弱形式的降噪机制和偏差-方差分解。实验证明WKRR在多个噪声水平下均优于传统方法，为后续数据驱动的李雅普诺夫函数发现提供了可靠的基础模型。
